labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 521110 ($3,182,236,222) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 521110 ($176,382,594,000). Vintage mismatch: 2024 wages over 2022 receipts, stated. Level: 6-digit. Harmonized to IPS basis ÷1.3407 (median of 65 dual-method codes).

n_band.derivation: margin 0.2102 (margins.json[52]: Damodaran Jan 2026: Financial Svcs. (Non-bank & Insurance) EBITDA/Sales 21.02%. Note: Damodaran reports 0.00% for banks (EBITDA not meaningful); bank codes inherit this non-bank default and are flagged ESTIMATE like all n_band values.); revenue/employee $8,377,231 (SUSB 2022 receipts/employment at 521110); class 100-499: 3 firms, avg revenue/firm $3,056,667 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $642,511 -> out of $1-10M band; class 500+: 12 firms, avg revenue/firm $14,697,716,583 (class receipts/firms), implied EBITDA $3,089,460,026 -> out of $1-10M band; n_band = 0
n_band.margin_source: Damodaran Jan 2026: Financial Svcs. (Non-bank & Insurance) EBITDA/Sales 21.02%. Note: Damodaran reports 0.00% for banks (EBITDA not meaningful); bank codes inherit this non-bank default and are flagged ESTIMATE like all n_band values.
